steps.title: Find the lower bound
steps.content:
Use the widest allowed space, $9.0$ feet, to get the fewest parking spaces.
$$
\frac{180}{9}=20
$$

steps.title: Find the upper bound
steps.content:
Use the narrowest allowed space, $7.5$ feet, to get the greatest possible count.
$$
\frac{180}{7.5}=24
$$

steps.title: Combine the bounds
steps.content: The possible number of parking spaces is from $20$ through $24$, inclusive. $$ 20\le n\le24 $$ The answer is D.
